summary: The share of vital record requests answered within 12 business days jumped from 46% to 91% between fiscal 2022 and fiscal 2024, which DORIS credits to its Historical Vital Records online platform reducing demand for staff-processed copy requests. Performance then dipped to 74% in fiscal 2025 after a staff member in the vital-records unit was temporarily reassigned to cover a vacancy elsewhere in the agency; DORIS said it expected the reassigned staffer to return in fiscal 2026, and performance did partly recover, to 82%.
oneLiner: increasing overall, despite a dip from a temporary staff reassignment
